mapper.select:
select count(*) from notice_info
where
ni_title like '%${search_key}%'
ni_content like '%${search_key}%'
ni_no = #{search_key_int}
mapper.insert: insert into notice_info (ni_no, ni_title, ni_content, mi_id) values(nextval('seq_ni_no'),#{ni_title}, #{ni_content}, #{mi_id} )
mapper.update: update notice_info set ni_title = #{ni_title}, ni_content = #{ni_content}, ni_modifi_dt = to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'::text) where ni_no = #{ni_no}
